zh.title: 威廉·米勒预言全集 - 大失望运动与基督复临预言 | William Miller Prophecies
zh.description: 美国浸信会牧师威廉·米勒（1782-1849）基于但以理书8:14「2300日」的末日计算，预言基督将于1843-1844年复临。预言落空后引发「大失望」事件，催生基督复临安息日会。
zh.keywords: 威廉米勒,米勒运动,大失望,基督复临,但以理书,2300日预言,安息日会,末日预言,1844年预言
zh.ogTitle: 威廉·米勒预言全集 | William Miller Prophecies
zh.ogDescription: 美国浸信会牧师威廉·米勒基于但以理书的末日计算，预言基督复临时间及「大失望」事件始末。
zh.twitterDescription: 威廉·米勒基于但以理书2300日计算预言基督1843-1844年复临，预言落空引发「大失望」，催生安息日会。

en.title: William Miller Prophecies - The Great Disappointment & Second Advent Predictions | Full Archive
en.description: American Baptist preacher William Miller (1782-1849) predicted Christ's return in 1843-1844 based on Daniel 8:14's '2300 days' calculation. The failed prophecy triggered 'The Great Disappointment' and gave birth to the Seventh-day Adventist Church.
en.keywords: William Miller,Millerism,Great Disappointment,Second Advent,Daniel 8:14,2300 day prophecy,Seventh-day Adventist,end times,1844 prophecy
en.ogTitle: William Miller Prophecies - The Great Disappointment & Advent Predictions
en.ogDescription: American Baptist preacher William Miller's end-times calculations based on Daniel 8:14, the failed 1844 prediction, and the birth of Adventism.
en.twitterDescription: William Miller predicted Christ's return in 1843-1844 based on Daniel 8:14. The 'Great Disappointment' shaped American religious history.
